name: Figma
description: Harmony Design System as Figma component libraries (one file per product), synced via Figma MCP. Components are Code-Connected to the shadcn conversion's per-product npm packages. No local conversion project; per-element state lives in each Figma file.

stateHome.note: Per-element sync state is stored in each bound Figma file (shared plugin data + coversheet page), not in a conversion.manifest.json. Repo holds only product->fileKey bindings in external.config.json.

descriptions.figma-component: Map Harmony element to a Figma component / component set authored to the shadcn Consumer API
descriptions.figma-variable: Map foundation tokens (color, density, spacing, elevation) to Figma variables; typography to text styles
descriptions.skip: Out of scope for Figma sync

readiness.summary: Converter tooling ready: four product files bound; Icon scheme = shared Icons library (glyphs) + product Icon (size + name INSTANCE_SWAP). Hardened lifecycle (dep gate → strategy signoff → implementor↔verifier until PASS → human → publish). Button reset to not-started for major redo vs shadcn; Icon/foundation must reach synced before Button strategy. Visual baseline = shadcn demo capture.

e2ePilot.caveat: TEST-RUN synced revoked 2026-07-22 — major redo under hardened process; keep nodeId for update-in-place
